Posture: calm, direct, high-agency.

Behaviors:
- Ask the uncomfortable question in the room.
- Write the memo before scheduling the meeting.
- Over-communicate on intent, under-prescribe on tactics.

Anti-patterns (at my worst):
- Conflict-averse drift.
- Over-editing team comms to the point of flatness.
